articles.summary: World US sends 15-Point Peace Plan to Iran via Pakistan; What’s on Agenda? By News Desk 7:52 am | Mar 25, 2026 WASHINGTON – As intense military escalation enters fourth week, United States comes toward ceasefire and delivered 15-point proposal to Iran aimed at ending the rapidly escalating Middle East war. The plan, reportedly sent through Islamabad, reveals Washington’s urgent push to find way out of a conflict that has already drawn in UAE, Saudi, Kuwait and multiple countries.

articles.title: Trump Admin Sends 15 - Point Ceasefire Proposal to Iran Will Tehran Agree to a Ceasefire ?
articles.query: (war OR conflict OR military OR sanctions)
articles.summary: US 82nd Airborne soldiers prepare for deployment to Middle East amid Iran conflict (Photo: Times Archives/Youtube) The Trump administration has sent Iran a 15‑point ceasefire proposal to end the escalating war in the Middle East, Pakistani officials and multiple reports say. AP News reported that the plan was relayed through intermediaries such as Pakistan. It is described as a comprehensive framework touching on sanctions relief, limits on Iran's nuclear and missile programmes, increased international monitoring, and guarantees for freedom of passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.summary: China auto market Fuel Prices in China Near the “¥9 Era,” but Not Across the Board Yet Edited by Yara From Gasgoo | March 25 , 2026 14:55 BJT f SHARE TWEET in SHARE SHARE Scan for mobile Gasgoo Munich- So far in 2026, refined oil prices have been adjusted six times in China—mostly hikes. On March 9, gasoline and diesel prices rose by 695 yuan and 670 yuan per ton, respectively. Then, on March 23, domestic gasoline and diesel prices climbed by 1,160 yuan and 1,115 yuan per ton—less than markets had anticipated.
